"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent identifies a contradiction in novelty claims and provides specific revisions, referencing prior work (Park et al., 2023) but does not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations and suggests more precise referencing of Park et al.'s work, showing good citation engagement but not auditing all load-bearing citations.",
  "RX.1": "Clearly discloses uncertainties regarding the existence of cited works and potential impact on novelty claims.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all requested dimensions effectively.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or errors introduced; feedback is constructive and avoids regressions.",
  "RX.5": "Major changes are traced with reasons, but minor edits lack annotation."
},

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies a contradiction in novelty claims and provides specific revisions, referencing prior work (Park et al., 2023) but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations and suggests more precise referencing of Park et al.'s work, showing good citation engagement but not auditing all load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly discloses uncertainties regarding the existence of cited works and potential impact on novelty claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all requested dimensions effectively.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors introduced; feedback is constructive and avoids regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are traced with reasons, but minor edits lack annotation.
